notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds into a double play, pitcher Joey Cantillo to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Joc Pederson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nicky Lopez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nicky Lopez singles on a ground ball to second baseman Travis Bazzana, deflected by first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Elias Díaz to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Evan Carter pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Evan Carter singles on a line drive to right fielder Chase DeLauter. Elias Díaz scores. Josh Jung to 2nd.
